name: attribute_points
description: Phase 4 RPG: level-up grants 1 attribute point. Spend on STR/VIT/AGI raises the matching base stat. Save/load (v5) round-trips the spent counts plus the unspent pool. Setup: gain_xp 150 → level 3 (2 level-ups), 2 unspent points. Spend 1 STR (+1 dmg), 1 VIT (+5 hp). Save → reset_progression → load. Final: damage 23, max_hp 145, level 3, 0 unspent points.
